name: O-13 --ignore-file suppresses findings for deprecated tokens listed in the operator-supplied allowlist
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'const c = tokens.color.legacy.red;\n' > src/c.ts && printf 'color.legacy.red\n' > ignore.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src --ignore-file ignore.txt 2>err.txt && grep -q 'clean' err.txt && echo suppressed 1>&2
